reconnect_strategy.notes: Use ConnectivityManager to detect network type changes and trigger reconnect proactively

background_handling.mechanism: WorkManager for deferred reconnects, Foreground Service for active calls
background_handling.doze_mode: Defer socket operations; reconnect on IDLE_MAINTENANCE window
background_handling.battery_optimization: Respect battery optimization settings; reduce polling frequency in low battery

token_lifecycle.revocation: Clear Keystore entry + disconnect socket on logout

event_alignment.new_message: Maps to socket 'chat:message' or FCM data payload

push_notification_hooks.fallback: When socket disconnected, FCM delivers event; on socket reconnect, deduplicate via event_id

reconnect_strategy.network_awareness: connectivity_plus plugin for network state detection

background_handling.ios: Background App Refresh + Silent Push for reconnect triggers
background_handling.platform_channel: Method channel for native background task coordination

token_lifecycle.revocation: Delete all secure storage entries + disconnect

reconnect_strategy.notes: Higher base delay for game contexts to avoid reconnect storms during gameplay

background_handling.behavior: Disconnect socket on pause, reconnect on resume with session validation
background_handling.game_loop_safety: All network callbacks dispatched on main thread via Update() queue

token_lifecycle.revocation: Clear stored tokens + disconnect + reset game session state

push_notification_hooks.service: Platform-specific (FCM on Android, APNs on iOS, none on desktop/WebGL)
push_notification_hooks.event_alignment: Same event mapping; desktop uses long-poll fallback

core_event_semantics_preservation.requirement: All mobile adapters MUST preserve the same event semantics as web-core SDK
events_preserved: reconciliation (sequence gap and replay conflict detection)
auth_flow_preserved: refreshSession → tokens updated → socket stays connected
logoutSession → tokens cleared → socket disconnected → state → unauthenticated

invariants: Background → foreground transition MUST NOT corrupt session tokens
If token expired during background, auto-refresh on foreground resume
Socket reconnect on foreground MUST validate token before connecting
Offline queue items queued during background are replayed on foreground reconnect
test_scenarios: App backgrounded for 5 minutes → foregrounded → session valid → socket reconnects
App backgrounded for 30 minutes → foregrounded → token expired → auto-refresh → socket reconnects
App killed → relaunched → tokens loaded from secure storage → session validated → socket connects
App backgrounded → network disconnected → network restored → foregrounded → reconnect
